title: Roasted Tlayudas
description: A twist on traditional Mexican tlayudas, roasted to perfection with bold flavors.
instructions: Roast the poblano peppers for 10-12 minutes, or until the skin is blistered.
Peel off the skin, seed, and chop the peppers.
In a large skillet, heat a tablespoon of oil over medium heat.
Add the sliced onions and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until caramelized.
Add the chopped cilantro, lime juice, salt, and pepper to the skillet.
Stir to combine and cook for 1 minute.
Warm the tlayudas in the oven for 2-3 minutes.
Assemble the tlayudas with the roasted poblano mixture, onions, and cilantro.
